name: 12ct Large Binder Clips - up&up™: Steel, Black & Silver, 2.19" Depth, 1.25" Width, Office Fasteners
description:
Keep large piles of paper together in one place with this 12-Count of Large Binder Clips from up&up™. These black binder clips feature a triangular design that offers optimum strength and compression to securely fasten stacks of paper, while the sturdy steel construction provides lasting use. Complete with 12 reusable clips, this pack fits neatly in a desk drawer and is great for your classroom or home office.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
